zh.Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fr: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde de Verdun於大約0975年出生在法國洛萊姆斯維爾頓時，她的父親Godefroid Ier de Verdun41歲，母親Mathilde Billung von Sachsen35歲。她於大約0992年與Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes在比利時結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1042年享年68歲。

zh-hans.Gent, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh-hans.Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fr: 法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengarde de Verdun于大约0975年出生在法国洛萊姆斯維爾頓时，她的父亲Godefroid Ier de Verdun41岁，母亲Mathilde Billung von Sachsen35岁。她于大约0992年与Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes在比利时结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1042年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde de Verdun was born about 0975, in Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, was 41 and her mother, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, was 35. She married Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes about 0992, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1042, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde de Verdun est née environ 0975, à Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes environ 0992, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1042, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde de Verdun um 0975 in Verdun, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godefroid Ier de Verdun 41 und ihre Mutter Mathilde Billung von Sachsen 35. Sie hat um 0992 in Belgien Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1042 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Verdun è nata il circa 0975 nel Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes circa 0992, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1042, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼバーダン
ja.Gent, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fr: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニー
ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Verdunが約0975年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバーダンで生まれた時，父Godefroid Ier de Verdunは41歳，母Mathilde Billung von Sachsenは35歳であった。約0992年にベルギーでArnould I, Seigneur de Florennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1042年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Verdun(이)가 대략 0975년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 베르던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godefroid Ier de Verdun(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde Billung von Sachsen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 0992년 벨기에에서 Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1042년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Verdun nasceu aproximadamente 0975, em Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes aproximadamente 0992, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1042, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde de Verdun родилась около 0975 г. в местности вирдун, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Godefroid Ier de Verdun было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes около 0992 г. в местности Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1042 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde de Verdun nació aproximadamente 0975, en Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Arnould I, Seigneur de Florennes aproximadamente 0992, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1042, a la edad de 68 años.
